name: Crustless Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
2. Add flour and cook until smooth; set aside.
3. Beat eggs; add milk, Monterey Jack cheese, cream cheese, and cottage cheese.
4. Stir in baking powder, salt, sugar, and butter-flour mixture, mixing until well blended.
5. Pour the mixture into a well-greased 9x13x2-inch pan.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
